[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110111001 6
1 1110101011 7
2 1111100100 6
3 0000000000 a
4 1111001110 7
5 1010110111 7
6 0011111001 6
7 0000111001 4
